derived.causal_summary: The installed Open Design desktop app holds rich local-first design systems but is only reachable through its in-app chat UI. Phase 001 researched its terminal/MCP/CLI surface and designed two skills. Phase 002 builds the mcp-open-design skill to drive the app from the terminal (modeled on mcp-magicpath). Phase 003 de-vendors sk-interface-design from the MIT ui-ux-pro-max repo (data first, then notices, keeping the Apache-2.0 base) and integrates it with mcp-open-design so it reads live local sources. Phase 004 live-wires the install and validates. Phase 005 adds seed-of-thought variation-diversity logic to sk-interface-design (v1.2.0). Phase 006 adds design-generation prompt patterns to sk-prompt (v2.2.0) for the magicpath and open-design usecases.
